data: Interview Preparation - Presenting Ideas Clearly and Confidently
Interview Preparation - Presenting Ideas Clearly and Confidently
Revise how to present ideas clearly and confidently in an interview

message: Let's revise how to present ideas clearly and confidently in an interview.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"To begin with [point] and in conclusion [summary]."

This structure helps you organize your thoughts clearly before presenting them in an interview.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/289f7835-8c67-408b-86f6-c57e20de9684-Interview---Presenting-Ideas-Clearly-and-Confidently.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/289f7835-8c67-408b-86f6-c57e20de9684-Interview---Presenting-Ideas-Clearly-and-Confidently.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to present an idea about employee motivation

1.To begin with recognition motivates employees and in conclusion it leads to higher retention rates.
2.Motivation is important. Employees should be motivated all the time. That is my point.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to present an idea about flexible working

1.Flexible working is very popular in most companies across the world these days.
2.To begin with flexible working improves work-life balance and in conclusion it increases employee satisfaction.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
